title: Add JadiKelas to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [JadiKelas](https://jadikelas.tech) to learn
- Open https://JadiKelas.tech. Display “JadiKelas” content from the site.

Fixes #12199

gist.headline: JadiKelas joins the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new learning app has sprouted in the community garden! JadiKelas is now officially listed in the Pollinations ecosystem.
gist.summary: Added the JadiKelas learning platform to the community apps directory and Greenhouse showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore JadiKelas alongside other community-built projects in the apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a learning app to the 'Greenhouse'. Depict Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse setting, tending to a new plant that looks like a book or has glowing text, representing the new learning app taking root.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, watering a glowing code-plant sprouting from an open book inside a lush digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
